title: Create Room
explanation: Click Next to generate your unique room ID and secure authorization keys on our backend.

title: Install VS Code Extension [ denthen_IO ]
explanation: First Click the button [SpecialKey] to Copy the SpecialKey.
Then Open VS Code, search for [ denthen_IO ] in the Extensions Marketplace, and click Install
After Installation open a file any [html, css, js]
Press ctrl + shift + p: This will open a modal at the top of the vscode
Paste the SpecialKey then Press Enter
Go back to denthenIO website for the next step

title: Test Connection
explanation: After Installation open any file [html, css, js]
Press ctrl + shift + p: This will open a modal at the top of the vscode
Paste your generated SpecialKey into the VS Code extension prompt and hit enter.
Note: This icon bellow will turn green if the connection is successful

title: Try Import Code
explanation: Open any code file in VS Code
Press ctrl + window + d [this will export all the code].
To export a snippet or specific code. First you need to highlight the code, then press crtl + window + s
Click next if export is successful

title: Connection Successful
explanation: Copy the Room Code to invite your friends to collaborate.
